cards.title: Booking a resort without checking transfer cost
cards.text: A cheap-looking resort rate can be offset entirely by a $500+ per-person seaplane transfer. Always ask for the all-in total, not just the room rate.

cards.title: Forgetting seaplanes don't fly at night
cards.text: If your international flight lands late, a seaplane-only resort may mean an unplanned night in Male first.

cards.title: Underestimating the wait
cards.text: Seaplane transfers often involve waiting at a lounge for your flight group to fill — build padding into your day-one plans rather than expecting to arrive immediately.
